description_blurb: An Air Force intelligence report from November 1948 relating to unidentified flying objects and flying saucers.
title: 341_110448_Records_Relating_to_the_Collection_and_Dissemination_of_Intelligence_1948-1955-TS_CONT_No.2_2-5300-2-5399
summary: An Air Force intelligence report from November 1948 relating to unidentified flying objects and flying saucers. It includes extracts detailing a sighting of an unidentified aircraft off the west coast of Holland in September 1948, which exhibited sudden acceleration and climb. The report also discusses recurring flying saucer sightings, including one over Neubiberg Air Base and another in Sweden where an object reportedly crashed into a lake, leading to the discovery of an uncharted crater by a naval salvage team. Swedish intelligence suggests these phenomena may originate from an unknown, possibly extraterrestrial, technology.
reported_object_description: Unidentified aircraft; single jet propelled A/C employing probably rocket assists; flying saucers
reported_behavior: Cruising at normal jet speed, leaving smoke trails and condensation trails, sudden acceleration, climb, hovering, crashed or landed in a lake.
official_resolution: One specific sighting was evaluated as a B-2 aircraft. For other 'flying saucers' phenomena, the Directorate of Intelligence was 'inclined not to discredit entirely this somewhat spectacular theory, meantime keeping an open mind on the subject.'
bust_reasoning: The document details two distinct incidents. The first (USAFE 10) involves three aircrews observing an unidentified jet-propelled aircraft with 'tremendous reserve power' and 'sudden acceleration and then climb' in 1948, capabilities unusual for the era. The second, more compelling incident (USAFE 14), involves a Swedish technical expert observing an object crash or land in a lake, leading to a naval salvage team discovering an uncharted crater. Swedish Air Intelligence Service concluded these phenomena are 'obviously the result of a high technical skill which cannot be credited to any presently known culture on earth,' a theory the US Directorate of Intelligence was 'inclined not to discredit entirely.' This multi-witness convergence, physical evidence, and explicit intelligence assessment of unknown, possibly non-terrestrial technology places the report firmly in the low bust score range.

# 341_110448_Records_Relating_to_the_Collection_and_Dissemination_of_Intelligence_1948-1955-TS_CONT_No.2_2-5300-2-5399 - Page 3

~~SECRET~~

SE Cont #
Hq, USAF

USAFE 2  &nbsp



# 341_110448_Records_Relating_to_the_Collection_and_Dissemination_of_Intelligence_1948-1955-TS_CONT_No.2_2-5300-2-5399 - Page 4

CONFIDENTIAL

USAFE 10    TT 1524    ~~CONFIDENTIAL~~    4 Nov 1948

From OI OB

Following report on unidentified aircraft sighting comes from 307th Bomb Group which participated in operation daggar. Unidentified aircraft was sighted by three crews of the group at 1402Z 5 Sep 48 off west coast of Holland, 5155N/0355E. Altitude of all aircraft was 30,000 feet. When first sighted the unidentified A/C was cruising at a normal jet speed, heading 120 degrees. Soon after first seen, A/C began leaving smoke trails and condensation trails accompanied by sudden acceleration and then climb. Generall agreed by observers that it was a single jet propelled A/C employing probably rocket assists with tremendous reserve power, more than normal curising speed for jets of the 1947 variety. Never within identification range; its course did not indicate its purpose.

Our evaluation of the above: B-2.

(END OF ITEM)

~~CONFIDENTIAL~~

NW 90307
DocId:34714985 Page 4



# 341_110448_Records_Relating_to_the_Collection_and_Dissemination_of_Intelligence_1948-1955-TS_CONT_No.2_2-5300-2-5399 - Page 5

2-5317
Cont. # [illegible]
Hq, USAE

TOP SECRET

USAFE 14          TT 1524          ~~TOP SECRET~~          4 Nov 1948

From OI OB

For some time we have been concerned by the recurring reports on flying saucers. They periodically continue to cop up; during the last week, one was observed hovering over Neubiberg Air Base for about thirty minutes. They have been reported by so many sources and from such a variety of places that we are convinced that they cannot be disregarded and must be explained on some basis which is perhaps slightly beyond the scope of our present intelligence thinking.

When officers of this Directorate recently visited the Swedish Air Intelligence Service. This question was put to the Swedes. Their answer was that some reliable and fully technically qualified people have reached the conclusion that "these phenomena are obviously the result of a high technical skill which cannot be credited to any presently known culture on earth." They are therefore assuming that these objects originate from some previously unknown or unidentified technology, possibly outside the earth.

One of these objects was observed by a Swedish technical expert near his home on the edge of a lake. The object crashed or landed in the lake and he carefully noted its azimuth from his point of observation. Swedish intelligence was sufficiently confident in his observation that a naval salvage team was sent to the lake. Operations were underway during the visit of USAFE officers. Divers had discovered a previuosly uncharted crater on the floor of the lake. No further information is available, but we have been promised knowledge of the results. In their opinion, the observation was reliable, and they believe that the depression on the floor of the lake, which did not appear on current hydrographic charts, was in fact caused by a flying saucer.

Although accepting this theory of the origin of these objects poses a whole new group of questions and puts much of our thinking in a changed light, we are inclined not to discredit entirely this somewhat spectacular theory, meantime keeping an open mind on the subject. What are your reactions?

~~TOP SECRET~~

(END OF USAFE ITEM 14)

~~TOP SECRET~~

NW 90307
DocId:34714985 Page 5



# 341_110448_Records_Relating_to_the_Collection_and_Dissemination_of_Intelligence_1948-1955-TS_CONT_No.2_2-5300-2-5399 - Page 6

~~TOP SECRET~~

He also knows of a Soviet-built radar set located near Kholomia Airfield (5 KM W of Airfield, near the town of Kholomia). This type set is called "Redut". He believes personnel of this set to be army, assigned to PVO, but is not certain. His regiment conducted flying cooperation exercises with the set, presumably to train the set operators, since the set was first located at Kholomia in Spring 1947. His aircraft, in October 1948, lost the set on such an exercise at a distance of 150 kilometers and altitude of 1200 meters. Following instructions, he then climbed to 3000 meters, when the set again picked him up. he states he believes this type set is standard throughout the PVO, and that he believes its maximum range to be 150 kilometers, because no training flights of greater distances were ever undertaken. Further details will be sought.

All TU-2 of 63 Regt are fitted with IFF type S. CH. (C-4), located in the tail of the aircraft and operated by a switch in the radio operator's compartment. Further, experiments with airborne radar (A tail warning device) werecarried out in 1947 and TU-2 of his regiment. This equipment involved the installation of a small external array. Sets were removed after a few days of testing, but results were understood to have been satisfactory.

On the subject of Kholomia Airfield, this field is currently apparently simply a level pasture, 600 meters N/S by 1400 meters E/W, but a paved runway is being constructed outside the north boundary of the airfield. No details are known to subject, as work has just commenced. The airfield currently has no installations; aircraft are parked in the open, and fuel is brought directly to the aircraft from the town of Kholomia (7 kilometers to the W) by tank trucks.

Another interesting fact is the arrival of the TU-2 with only a crew of three, and without the dorsal turret machine gun in place (nor anyplace on the aircraft). Subject states that the air gunner sergeants who should occupy this fourth position are on duty with the regiment, but are engaged in fatigue details, and XXXX rarely carried on training flights.

Subject believes the TU-2 to be manufactured in a factory in Moscow, and it is noted that a plaque in the aircraft stated that it had been produced in Factory No. 19.

A fuller report will shortly be underway, based on interrogation conducted so far, and many more details are espected to be obtained in the next week or two, with both pilot and navigator being interrogated.

(END USFA-1)

~~TOP SECRET~~

NW 90307
DocId:34714985 Page 6



# 341_110448_Records_Relating_to_the_Collection_and_Dissemination_of_Intelligence_1948-1955-TS_CONT_No.2_2-5300-2-5399 - Page 7

~~SECRET~~

USAFE 16  TT 1524  ~~SECRET~~  4 Nov 48

CIC source reports that the Russians have ordered CSR Missions in foreign
countries to purchase radar tubes in large quantities regardless of costs.
Mission also instructed to purchase a complete radar set.

(Eval C-3)

(END OF ITEM)

~~SECRET~~

NW 90307

cover_up_reasoning: The document was originally classified at the TOP SECRET level, indicating a high degree of sensitivity at the time of its creation. However, it has since been declassified, and the visible strikethroughs of classification markings are part of this declassification process rather than active concealment. There are no substantial black-bar redactions of content, witness names, or specific details, beyond a single minor 'XXXX' on page 6. The report is an internal intelligence summary and discussion, not a public statement, so no contradictions are evident. The reference to 'promised knowledge of the results' from Swedish intelligence implies ongoing investigation but not active concealment by the US agency.
summary_zh: 一份发布于1948年11月的空军情报报告，涉及不明飞行物及飞碟。报告摘录了关于一次不明飞行器目击事件的详情，该事件发生于1948年9月荷兰西海岸附近，飞行器表现出突然加速和爬升的特征。报告亦讨论了反复出现的飞碟目击事件，包括一次发生在诺伊比贝格空军基地上空的事件，以及另一次发生在瑞典的事件，据报有一个物体坠入湖中，导致海军打捞队发现了一个未标明的陨石坑。瑞典情报部门推测，这些现象可能源于一种未知、甚至可能是地外技术。
reported_object_description_zh: 不明飞行器；单架喷气式飞行器，可能采用火箭助推；飞碟
reported_behavior_zh: 以正常喷气速度巡航，留下烟迹和凝结尾迹，突然加速，爬升，悬停，坠入或降落在湖中。
official_resolution_zh: 一次具体目击事件被评估为B-2型飞机。对于其他“飞碟”现象，情报局“倾向于不完全否定这一多少有些引人注目的理论，同时对此事保持开放态度。”
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件详述了两起截然不同的事件。第一起事件（USAFE 10）涉及三名机组人员于1948年观察到一架不明喷气式飞行器，其具备“巨大的储备动力”和“突然加速及爬升”能力，这在当时是不同寻常的。第二起更具说服力的事件（USAFE 14）涉及一名瑞典技术专家观察到一个物体坠入或降落在湖中，导致海军打捞队发现了一个未标明的陨石坑。瑞典空军情报局得出结论，这些现象“显然是高度技术技能的产物，无法归因于地球上任何现有已知文明”，美国情报局“倾向于不完全否定”这一理论。这种多目击者证词的汇合、物理证据以及对未知（可能非地球）技术的明确情报评估，使得该报告的“揭穿”可能性极低。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件最初被列为绝密级别，表明其在创建时具有高度敏感性。然而，该文件此后已被解密，分类标记上可见的划线是解密过程的一部分，而非主动隐瞒。除了第6页上一个微小的“XXXX”之外，没有对内容、目击者姓名或具体细节进行实质性的黑条遮盖。该报告是一份内部情报摘要和讨论，并非公开声明，因此没有明显的矛盾之处。提及瑞典情报部门“承诺提供结果”暗示了正在进行的调查，但并非美国机构的主动隐瞒。
claims: Unidentified aircraft sighted off the west coast of Holland.
Object exhibited sudden acceleration and climb with smoke/condensation trails.
Flying saucers are recurring and cannot be disregarded.
Swedish intelligence believes phenomena are results of high technical skill not from Earth.
A Swedish technical expert observed an object crash/land in a lake.
Naval salvage team found an uncharted crater in a lake, believed to be caused by a flying saucer.
claims_zh: 在荷兰西海岸附近发现不明飞行器。
物体表现出突然加速和爬升，并伴有烟迹/凝结尾迹。
飞碟现象反复出现，不容忽视。
瑞典情报部门认为这些现象源于非地球的高度技术技能。
一名瑞典技术专家观察到一个物体坠入/降落在湖中。
海军打捞队在湖中发现一个未标明的陨石坑，据信由飞碟造成。
witnesses: Three crews of the 307th Bomb Group
bust_explanations: Misidentified advanced prototype aircraft: For USAFE 10, the observed 'single jet propelled A/C employing probably rocket assists' with 'tremendous reserve power' and 'sudden acceleration and then climb' could potentially be an experimental aircraft from a known nation, though its capabilities would be highly advanced for 1948.

Witness misinterpretation of known aircraft or natural phenomenon: For USAFE 10, despite multiple witnesses, there could be a collective misinterpretation of a distant, unusual aircraft or a rare atmospheric event.

Misinterpretation of a natural geological feature: For USAFE 14, the 'uncharted crater' on the lake floor could be a natural formation, and the witness's observation of an object crashing/landing could be a misinterpretation, despite the confidence of Swedish intelligence.
bust_explanations_zh: 误认为先进原型机：对于USAFE 10事件，所观察到的“单架喷气式飞行器，可能采用火箭助推”，具备“巨大的储备动力”和“突然加速及爬升”能力，可能是一种已知国家的实验性飞行器，尽管其能力在1948年而言将是高度先进的。
目击者对已知飞行器或自然现象的误判：对于USAFE 10事件，尽管有多名目击者，但可能存在对远处异常飞行器或罕见大气现象的集体误判。
对自然地质特征的误判：对于USAFE 14事件，湖底的“未标明陨石坑”可能是一种自然地质构造，而目击者对物体坠入/降落的观察可能是一种误判，尽管瑞典情报部门对此充满信心。
cover_up_indicators: Original classification: TOP SECRET SECURITY INFORMATION
Reference to ongoing, unreleased follow-up investigation by foreign intelligence ('promised knowledge of the results')
cover_up_indicators_zh: 原始密级：绝密安全信息
提及外国情报机构正在进行中且未公布的后续调查（“承诺提供结果”)
